should_trigger.prompt: This spec depends on the latest Gemini API streaming behavior; verify the official source first.
Before implementing with this SDK method, confirm it exists in current docs or installed dependency.
The plan cites a cloud service limit and model capability that may have changed.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Read local plan.md and execute T1.
Review the diff against local ACs and task evidence.
Capture this local project pitfall after verification.

assertions: Uses primary or local installed sources before making external claims.
Records observed facts separately from inference.
